# Two-Factor Authentication

Shoppers can enable two-factor authentication from the security section of profile settings, choosing either an authenticator app or a code sent by text message. Once enabled, a second factor is required only on a new device or after thirty days on a trusted device, so routine sign-ins on a personal computer are not interrupted.

[Source: account_security.md#two-factor-authentication]
